scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) delegates to parseInput(Reader, String) and returns Document when treeBuilder.parse succeeds
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a fake TreeBuilder stub whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) returns a placeholder Document; stubbing to isolate Parser behavior
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the placeholder Document instance provided by the stub
pseudocode: TEST TC01_O1 parseInput String overload success

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws RuntimeException when treeBuilder.parse throws
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a fake TreeBuilder stub whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) throws RuntimeException("fail"); stubbing to simulate underlying parse failure
pseudocode: TEST TC02_O1 parseInput String overload exception

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) returns Document when treeBuilder.parse succeeds
scenarios.precondition: Parser constructed with a fake TreeBuilder stub whose parse(Reader, String, Parser) returns a placeholder Document; stubbing to isolate Parser behavior
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Document is the placeholder Document instance provided by the stub
pseudocode: TEST TC03_O2 parseInput Reader overload success

scenarios.description: parseInput(Reader, String) throws IllegalArgumentException when given a null Reader
scenarios.precondition: Parser with real TreeBuilder, passing null Reader to simulate invalid input causing immediate NPE
pseudocode: TEST TC04_O2 parseInput Reader overload null-reader

scenarios.description: parseInput(String, String) throws IllegalArgumentException for a null html argument
scenarios.precondition: Parser with real HtmlTreeBuilder; passing null html to delegate method should be validated
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IllegalArgumentException; no underlying parse is invoked
pseudocode: TEST TC05_O1 parseInput String overload null-html
